title: BearHugiis Modpack 2.0
description: Small Cozy Vanilla-like Modpack for an SMP - Remade for Neoforge
body:
This pack is built to keep the true Minecraft experience alive — the essentials that make survival smoother, prettier, and more fun.

It includes all the basic quality-of-life mods you need: a map to help you explore together, recipe viewers so crafting is easy, and beautiful shaders that make every sunrise and campfire glow with warmth. You’ll find new cozy animals roaming the world, extra foods to cook and share, and a few dungeons to explore when adventure calls.

The goal is simple — to create a world that feels like classic Minecraft, but a little more alive and comfortable. Build cottages, farm with friends, explore hidden caves, and enjoy the journey without losing that original survival feel.

This modpack is made for our viewer SMP, so everyone can jump in, relax, and live out the cozy Minecraft dream together. Join the Discord server to get the Server IP!
